subcodes.first_line: O leaf that speaketh in praise of God! Return thy thanks unto the true Guide and spiritual Confirmer, Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه الناطقه بثناء الله شکر کن حضرت موفق حقیقی و موید معنوی را که
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @the power of words; of speech, @firmness in the Covenant
